//: MCP servers for the SRE agent. ALL must be provisioned with READ-ONLY credentials. Read-tool allow/deny is enforced in .claude/settings.json and .claude/hooks/block_mutations.py.

pagerduty.//: Official PagerDuty MCP server. Used for incident context + posting the RCA note. manage_incidents (resolve/ack) is DENIED in settings.json.

grafana.//: Official Grafana MCP server: one server covers Prometheus metrics, Loki logs, Tempo traces, alerting, OnCall, and Sift. Use a VIEWER-scoped service-account token. -disable-write enforces read-only at the server.

kubernetes.//: Kubernetes MCP server. Point KUBECONFIG at a read-only ServiceAccount/RBAC role. Read verbs only are allowlisted in settings.json.

aws.//: AWS API MCP server. In production: OIDC/IRSA — credentials flow via AWS_ROLE_ARN + AWS_WEB_IDENTITY_TOKEN_FILE injected by EKS; no AWS_PROFILE or static keys needed. Locally: set AWS_PROFILE in your shell (inherited by this subprocess). READ_OPERATIONS_ONLY enforces read-only at the server level.

github.//: GitHub MCP server (npx — Docker-in-Docker unavailable in ECS Fargate). Read-only token; used by deploy-correlator for deploys/PRs/diffs.

slack.//: Slack MCP server. Used only to post the stakeholder update to the incident channel.

drawio.//: Draw.io MCP server — create and update architecture diagrams as .drawio files.
